caption:
👩‍🏫✨ So, they think I'm just another professor grading papers late at night? Oh, they don't know what they're in for... 💋

Tonight, the university library is quiet, save for the soft hum of the HVAC and the scratching of my pen. I'm wearing my usual black silk blouse tucked into a high-waisted pencil skirt that hugs every curve just enough to make my students squirm, even when they think they're alone with me in the office. The fabric clings as I lean back in my leather chair, legs crossed just right. 🖤📚

Dr. Elena Rossi, I'm told. But to you, I'm the one who knows your secrets. As I turn around, the dim lighting catches the silk sheen of my blouse, accentuating the deep cleavage before my black blazer buttons snap shut with a satisfying click. Someone knocks, hesitant but eager. I smile, a predator's grin, as I know exactly who it is. It's not just a tutoring session tonight; it's a distraction from reality that we both knew we needed. 🕯️🔥

Come closer, baby. Let the lights dim. Let the work... wait. 😏💥

#UniversityTeacher #LateNightStudy #ProfessorLife #CurvesAndBooks #ElenaRossi #SexyOffice #AcademicAllure #SecretTutoring #ItalianVibe #InstaTeacher
